home.title: Welcome to the SMP
home.content:
Welcome to the official wiki for our Scripted SMP! Select an article on the left to learn about our lore, rules, and factions.

Season 1 is currently Active.

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.content:
• No Griefing: Respect other players' builds.
  • Scripting: Only approved client-side scripts are allowed.
  • Roleplay: Stay in character during lore events!

lore.title: The First Age
lore.content:
It all started when the Ancient Builders left the Overworld...

Now, three factions battle for control of the spawn plateau.
